message:
fix(fsqlite-pager): separate open and cancelled Cx in cancel-mid-IO test

Use distinct Cx instances for VFS file opening (cx_open) and cancellation
testing (cx_cancelled) to avoid cancelling the context before the file is
opened, which would cause the open call itself to fail rather than testing
the intended read cancellation path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
